# SharedRichText behavioral oracle

Checked-in oracle fixtures for rich-text OT semantics, generated by
`tools/shared-rich-text-oracle/generate.js` with exact versions
`rich-text@4.1.0` and `quill-delta@4.2.1`.

Do not hand-edit these files. Regenerate them with:

```bash
cd tools/shared-rich-text-oracle
npm install
npm test
npm run generate
```

## Schema

Each fixture is one JSON file with:

- `base`: serialized base document (`Delta.ops`)
- `deltas.a` / `deltas.b`: one or two serialized deltas
- `normalized`: canonical serialized forms of the same inputs
- `apply.a` / `apply.b`: each delta applied independently to `base`
- `apply.compose`: only when the composed delta also applies cleanly to `base`
- `compose`: `type.compose(a, b)` when two deltas are present
- `transform.left` / `transform.right`: `type.transform(a, b, 'left'|'right')`
  (the adapter semantics from `ottypes/rich-text/lib/type.js` are
  `delta2.transform(delta1, side === "left")`)
- `inverse.*`: `delta.invert(base)` for each delta, plus the composed delta
- `cursor` / `selection`: transformed through the delta named in `through`

The `same-position-insert` fixture pins the upstream adapter tie-break:

- `transform(A, B, left)` → `[{ "retain": 1 }, { "insert": "A" }]`
- `transform(A, B, right)` → `[{ "insert": "A" }]`
